periods.title: Key West from the air in August 1954
periods.summary: A dated State Archives of Florida aerial photograph provides direct mid-century visual evidence after wartime naval expansion and before later shoreline changes. The initial placement is approximate and can be adjusted in the browser.
highlights: Florida Memory dates this photograph to August 1954 and identifies it as aerial image C019604.
Use the nudge, scale, and rotation controls to improve the local fit against recognizable shoreline and street features.
Because this is an oblique archival photograph rather than an orthophoto, it must not be used for shoreline measurement.

overlay.title: August 1954 Key West aerial — experimental fit
overlay.attribution: State Archives of Florida, Florida Memory, C019604, August 1954

periods.title: Island-wide aerial view of Key West in 1956
periods.summary: A 1956 State Archives of Florida aerial view supplies a second distinct mid-century source outside NOAA's empty live imagery mosaics. The photograph is positioned approximately over Key West and remains user-adjustable.
highlights: Florida Memory catalogs this image as PR24184, photographed in 1956.
The broad island view is useful for comparing Trumbo Point, the naval waterfront, the airport side of the island, and adjacent keys.
Perspective distortion is expected; use the manual controls for visual exploration rather than quantitative measurement.

overlay.title: 1956 Key West aerial — experimental fit
overlay.attribution: State Archives of Florida, Florida Memory, PR24184, 1956
